title: Tactical Jetpack
description: Adds a tactical jetpack with 8-directional thrusting, sticky bombs that grant speed boost on throw and stick to blocks/entities, fall damage buffer within 14 blocks, and speed boost with fall damage immunity during the effect
body:
## Tactical Jetpack

A Minecraft mod that adds a powerful tactical jetpack with advanced movement capabilities and tactical equipment

### Features

**Tactical Jetpack**
- 8-directional thrusting (forward, backward, left, right, up, down, and diagonals)
- 20-second cooldown between uses
- Visual and audio effects when activated
- **Cooldown resets on killing a mob**

**Sticky Bomb**
- Throwable explosive that sticks to blocks and entities
- Grants speed boost when thrown
- Perfect for quick escapes or tactical advantages
  
**Tiger Crouch Cannon**
- Right-click to fire a special prejectile
- Does not destory blocks
- Applies the Imbalance effect to hit mobs
- Great for crowd control and disabling enemies

**Fall Damage System**
- Fall damage buffer within 14 blocks when speed effect is active
- Automatic speed boost upon safe landing (3-14 blocks)
- Tactical buffer notification when damage is prevented

**Speed Boost System**
- 5-second Speed II effect after jetpack use or bomb throw
- 10-second cooldown between speed boosts
- Damage immunity during speed effect duration

### Controls
- Default jetpack key: `V`
- Throw bomb key: `G`

### Crafting Recipes

**Sticky Bomb**
   null  Iron Ingot  null；
Iron Ingot  TNT  Iron Ingot；
   null  Slime Ball  null；
   
**Tiger Crouch Cannon**
   null        null      stick；
Iron Ingot  Iron Ingot Iron Ingot；
   null     Iron Ingot    null；

### Version Notice
- This mod follows a specific versioning pattern to distinguish between language releases: 
- X.X.0 — Chinese Version
- X.X.1 — English Version
- For example, version 1.2.0 is the Chinese release, while 1.2.1 is the English release. Please download the appropriate version based on your preferred language
         
### Requirements
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge
